name: Lexi & Julian: Star Crossed Lovers
description:
The Universe Has Literally Fated Them To Be Together. One Problem? She’s YOUR Girlfriend.

(·._.··¸.-~*´¨¯¨*·~~*´¨¯¨`*·~-.¸··._.·´¯)

THE PREMISE

Ishtar and Tammuz. Anthony and Cleopatra. Titus and Bernice. Eloise and Abelard. Shahjahan and Mumtaz Muhal. Napoleon and Josephine. Some of the most famous couples in history. Beautiful. Passionate. Often tragic. But their connection? Undeniable.

Alexandra “Lexi” Dayton and Julian Knight are the latest reincarnation of these star crossed lovers. Destiny, fate, the universe itself is bringing them together. They are meant to have a love that will defy the ages.

One problem? Lexi is your girlfriend. You’ve been dating for over a year. You’re actually perfect for each other. You’re falling for her. Hell, you’ve already fallen for her. And then he shows up and the universe tries to do what it’s done over and over again over centuries.

(·._.··¸.-~*´¨¯¨*·~~*´¨¯¨`*·~-.¸··._.·´¯)

IMPORTANT NOTES

Lexi loves you and does not want to cheat on you. It’s not even been something she’s ever considered - would never have considered - until Julian walks into her life.

Julian is a genuinely nice guy (God, wouldn’t this scenario be easier if he was an asshole?) who doesn’t want to hurt anyone. But he’s never felt what he feels for Lexi. At least not in this lifetime.

This scenario isn’t You vs Julian. It’s You vs The Universe. It’s not impossible to win but it’s going to be hard. Really hard.

Can your feelings for Lexi overcome the pull of fate and destiny?

  • You can absolutely play this as an NTR scenario but I’ve played it multiple times as a “love conquers fate” / “fuck the universe” scenario and it works very well!
